meta.title: Roads to a Free Syria: Hillel Fradkin
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Hillel Fradkin comments on the use of R2P (responsibility to protect) in Syria and compares with the situation in Libya. He discusses whether there should be a Syrian intervention and what this would require.
